name: Content Engine
description: A four-agent content pipeline for trend discovery, drafting, quality review, and approval-gated publishing recommendations.

agents.name: scout
agents.description: Trend Finder — monitors industry signals, audience questions, and emerging topics to surface content opportunities.

agents.name: writer
agents.description: Content Creator — drafts posts, articles, captions, and campaign concepts matched to the user's voice.
agents.heartbeat_description: On-demand only, triggered by approved briefs or direct tasks
agents.output_format: Headline/Hook → Draft → Channel Adaptations → Source Notes → Approval Ask

agents.name: critic
agents.description: Quality Gate — reviews all content for tone consistency, audience fit, originality, and approval compliance before delivery.
agents.heartbeat_description: Continuous — processes review queue as items arrive

agents.name: scheduler
agents.description: Publishing Manager — recommends timing, cadence, and cross-posting plans without publishing externally unless approved.
agents.heartbeat_description: Daily publishing window review at 9:00 AM

scheduler.description: Publishing window review — daily at 9:00 AM

team_display.short_description: Creates and publishes content matched to your voice

review_page.context_description: Research used to inform this draft

quality_dimensions.label: Grounding
quality_dimensions.description: Are claims backed by cited sources?

quality_dimensions.label: Authenticity
quality_dimensions.description: Does it sound like the user's voice?

quality_dimensions.label: Completeness
quality_dimensions.description: Does it fully address the mission?

builder.suggested_topics_placeholder: e.g., AI agents, robotics, technology trends
